---
title: "About"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/41604567
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 12em

  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang

---
### Quick intro
I'm Peter Hoang, a software engineer (AI/ML & Backend) with extensive software and product building
experience. I've been writing software since 2009.

My current AI stack is Python-based (Pytorch, Huggingface, ...). Other techs that I'm currently productive with include: Django, Javascript, Html/Css, PostgreSQL, and a little of React Native.

In terms of software engineering, in the coming periods I'd love to learn how software works
at a lower level, probably via learning and using a lower-level programming language more frequently; and to learn more about distributed computing through a big cloud such as AWS.

### CV
<a id="short-cv"></a>
In 2023, I went back to school and currently doing a Msc in CS at <a href="https://www.csd.uwo.ca" target="_blank">Western University</a>, Canada (2023 - 2024). I feel fortunate to witness and experience the biggest breakthroughs in AI in a long time.

### Connect

To connect or follow me, this is <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunghuuhoang/" target="_blank">my Linkedin</a>.
